last_prompt: Research and design a `wreck-it tasks` sub-command family for managing task files interactively from the CLI without editing JSON by hand. Review the existing CLI structure in cli/src/cli.rs (clap commands) and the Task type in cli/src/types.rs. Design sub-commands: (1) `wreck-it tasks list [--task-file] [--status pending|inprogress|completed|failed]` — tabular output of all tasks with their status and role, (2) `wreck-it tasks add --id <id> --description <desc> [--role ideas|implementer|evaluator] [--phase N] [--priority N] [--depends-on id1,id2]` — appends a new task to the file, (3) `wreck-it tasks set-status --id <id> --status <status>` — updates the status of a task in place, (4) `wreck-it tasks validate [--task-file]` — checks for missing required fields, duplicate IDs, and unresolved depends_on references. Document design as inline comments in cli/src/cli.rs.
